_comment: Write tools (annotations.readOnlyHint === false) that do NOT yet carry a cesteral governance contract. This is the coverage RATCHET: the write-coverage test fails if any non-allowlisted write tool is ungoverned (no new ungoverned writes) AND if any allowlisted tool is no longer an ungoverned write (stale entry). As tools are migrated to the entity/effect contract (PRs 3-N), remove them from this list. Goal: empty.
